Burp Suite Mastery: From Beginner to Advanced

Issued: June, 2026

Comprehensive mastery of Burp Suite Professional toolset, web application scanning, manual testing, intercepting proxies, and advanced penetration testing techniques.

Udemy

Network Security: Mastering Cybersecurity, Ethical Hacking

Issued: March 26, 2025

Detailed practical validation of network security principles, ethical hacking techniques, packet monitoring, firewall engineering, and defense configurations.

Udemy

Executive Diploma in Business Management

Issued: June, 2026

Management framework training covering corporate strategy, product operations, workflow optimization, leadership principles, and business development foundations.

Udemy

Agentic AI - Risk & Cybersecurity Masterclass

Issued: 2025

Evaluates AI-powered agent risks, autonomous pipeline vulnerabilities, LLM security auditing, prompt injections, and mitigation frameworks for AI architectures.

Udemy

Ethical Hacking

Issued: 2025

Hands-on assessment of vulnerability identification, custom script automation, network penetration, system exploitation, and remediation engineering.

LinkedIn Learning

Networking Basics

Issued: 2024

Core fundamentals of communication models (OSI, TCP/IP), routing protocols, DNS infrastructure, subnetting, and packet routing operations.
